C1-ORCALCHEMIST

Neutral Medium Orc Fighter 4; Alchemist 8;

Init 4; Senses Darkvision; Perception: +15

Defense

AC 21, touch 15, flat-footed 16

hp 85

Fort 12, Ref 11, Will 3

Offense

Speed 30 ft.

Melee Falchion +14/+9 (2d4+4 18-20),

Ranged Ranged Touch Attack +14 (Special ),

Alchemist spells prepared (CL 8; concentration +13)

3rd (3/day)- Haste (DC 18); Lightning Lash Bomb Admixture (DC 18); Thorn Body (DC 18);

2nd (5/day)- Barkskin (DC 17); Cat's Grace (DC 17); Invisibility (DC 17); Ironskin (DC 17); See Invisibility (DC 17);

1st (6/day)- Blend (DC 16); Bomber's Eye (DC 16); Enlarge Person (DC 16); Invisibility Alarm (DC 16); Targeted Bomb Admixture (DC 16); True Strike (DC 16);

Statistics

Str 16, Dex 18, Con 14, Int 20, Wis 10, Cha 8

Base Atk + +10; CMB +13; CMD 28

Feats Armor Focus; Brew Potion; Cleave; Dodge; Great Cleave; Point-Blank Shot; Power Attack; Precise Shot; Rapid Shot; Throw Anything; Weapon Focus: Falchion;

SQ ; Alchemy; Armor Training +1; Bomb +4d6; Bravery +1; Mutagen; Poison Resistance +6; Poison Use; Swift Alchemy; Swift Poisoning; Discoveries: Acid Bomb; Precise Bombs; Sand Bomb; Spontaneous Healing;

Skills Craft (a) +20; Knowledge (arcana) +20; Perception +15; Profession (a) +15; Spellcraft +20; Survival +9;

Equipment
